title: HypurrCo AMA with HypurrFi
summary_title: Euler on Hyperliquid: flexible lending, Pokemon indexes, and trading terminals
summary_description: HyperFi brings Euler's modular lending stack to Hyperliquid, enabling complex assets, earn vaults, and a Visa card that lets you borrow against your positions in real time.

key_moments.label: HyperFi announces Euler integration with upcoming card, HIP3 markets
Andrew explains: lending is a commodity, HyperFi is a financial platform for traders
Converting on-chain positions into a battery to run your life
Euler enables non-pooled assets like RWAs, complex structured products
Isolated vs. Euler markets: capital efficiency and horizontal mobility
Earn vaults launch with HYPE, USDC, USDT, USDH; Clearstar as curator
HyperFi card: borrow against yield positions, spend on-chain instantly
HIP3 markets and Pokemon index: financializing collectibles, targeting traders
